title: cyperus tabularis
intro: Cyperus tabularis, also known as the umbrella sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family and is native to tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus tabularis include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as having antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
